face.structure: angular with a sharp jawline, high cheekbones that create a slightly sunken appearance

eyes.shape: narrow, almond-shaped with a sharp outer edge

face.expression: subtly intense, with a slight furrow of the brow indicating deep contemplation

skin.texture: smooth with occasional blemishes on the forehead
skin.rendering_notes: soft gradient transitions with realistic shading under cheekbones

hair.style: slightly messy bangs hanging over the forehead and longer strands at the nape
hair.flow: moderate flow with subtle movement suggesting a breeze

character.aura: quiet intensity with an impenetrable air of focus

outfit.design: minimalistic with dark gray and black panels
outfit.fit: tailored, hugging the torso and arms closely

composition.framing: mid-shot focusing on upper torso and head
composition.pose: standing straight with arms crossed tightly
composition.gesture: head tilted slightly to the side, conveying curiosity

background.color_palette: cool tones of blues and grays
background.details: faint outlines of geometric shapes in the background
background.rules: elements should not distract from the character's expression
